# Starweft

> Starweft is a P2P CLI tool for distributed multi-agent task coordination. Powered by Ed25519 signing, SQLite, and OpenClaw integration.

Starweft is a distributed multi-agent task coordination CLI built in Rust.
This documentation covers installation, architecture, guides, CLI reference, and security.

## Documentation

### Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/getting-started/introduction)
- [Installation](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [Quick Start](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/getting-started/quick-start)

### Concepts

- [Architecture](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/concepts/architecture)
- [Roles](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/concepts/roles)
- [Messages](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/concepts/messages)
- [Task Lifecycle](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/concepts/task-lifecycle)

### Guides

- [Your First Vision](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/guides/first-vision)
- [Multi-Machine Setup](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/guides/multi-machine)
- [OpenClaw Integration](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/guides/openclaw)

- [Error Codes](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/reference/error-codes)

- [Message Signing](https://co-r-e.github.io/starweft-docs/docs/security/signing)
